block.woodencog.ct_transformer.tooltip.s: Wooden Transformers are a new TFC rotation source. Convert form Create to TFC rotation. Rotation speed is matched from input to output.
woodencog.basin.selection_mode.auto_feed: Use output fluids as input fluids
woodencog.ponder.cool.text_1: Heated item can be cooled down with water.
woodencog.ponder.heat.text_1: An item capable of receiving heat will be heated by lava, the maximum temperature is 1700°.
woodencog.ponder.heat.text_2: It's the same with fire, but the temperature limit is 200°. Perfect for cooking !
woodencog.ponder.wooden_generator.water_: The Generator needs to be placed besides a TFC rotation source
SU are generated according to the source rotation speed
woodencog.ponder.wooden_generator.windmi: The Rustic Windmill generates double the SU
woodencog.ponder.wooden_transformer.head: Transforming rotation
